title: Create POST /api/vault/projects endpoint with board + columns scaffold
implementation_notes: Body: { name: string }. Validate with zod or inline check — name must be non-empty string.
Generate IDs: projectId = 'project-' + slugify(name) + '-' + nanoid(6), boardId = 'board-' + projectId suffix, columnIds = ['col-todo-…', 'col-inprogress-…', 'col-review-…', 'col-done-…'].
Use resolveSharedVaultPath() from runtime.ts to get the vault root.

Write project .md using serializeProjectDocument from project-write.ts (or replicate the atomic write pattern). Frontmatter: id, type='project', workspace_id (from readConfiguredWorkspaceId()), name, created_at, updated_at.
Write board .md: frontmatter id, type='board', workspace_id, project_id, name=name+' Board', created_at, updated_at.
Write 4 column .mds: frontmatter id, type='column', workspace_id, project_id, board_id, name, position (0-3), created_at, updated_at. Names: 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Review', 'Done'.
All writes go to vault/shared/projects/, vault/shared/boards/, vault/shared/columns/ respectively.
Add a unit test in app/test/ covering: successful creation, missing name → 400, existing project file → 409.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/vault/projects with { name: 'My Project' } returns 201 and 6 files are created on disk.
Subsequent GET /api/vault/read-model includes the new project, board, and columns.
completion_summary: Added POST /api/vault/projects to create a project, default board, and four workflow columns under vault/shared with focused tests.
